description: Language-neutral layout spec for the emojig picker. Consumed by the Zig app. Mirrors src/defaults.zig.

animation.description: Controls the exit-fade (block-shade preview) animation. exit_preview_tui applies when running inline in a terminal (TUI mode); exit_preview_gui applies when launched as a floating window (GUI mode). Set either to false to skip the animation and exit immediately on selection. The EMOJIG_EXIT_PREVIEW env var and EMOJIG_EXIT_PREVIEW_MS override these defaults at runtime.
